title: Purchase of Desktop Computers
description: FINCA Microfinance Bank intends to purchase 32 new desktop computers (Dell Optiplex GX7000) to replace old ones as part of its 2024 plans. Specifications: Dell Optiplex GX7000, Keyboard, Mouse, Screen Monitor 24 Inch, HDD 1TB, RAM 16GB, Core i7. Quantity: 32 units.
